title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 321.020 - Circuit court may establish districts
text:
321.020.  Circuit court may establish districts. — The circuit court sitting in and for any county of this state, containing all or part of a proposed district, may, as provided in this chapter, establish fire protection districts.
(L. 1947 V. I p. 432 § 3, A.L. 1969 H.B. 322, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634, S.B. 628, A.L. 1979 S.B. 236) 
Effective 6-15-79
